ab: ana cu ksiyux pila isu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: uya ga! pisa pila ksyuxun su?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: wal mu kngyan maray pila la, ana cu ksiyux pila isu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ini cu aray pila uyi ay!
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: wal mu kngyan maray pila la, ana cu ksiyux pila isu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: iyat cu, wal misu ksiyuxn pila cnxan na ru, ini su biqi kingan na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: ana cu pksiyux lukus isu?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: uya, agan kya nanak.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: ana cu pksiyux biru isu?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: wal mu ksyuxan cqa Ciwas la.
en: B: I lent it to Ciwas.

ab: ksyuxay ta cikay zitensya su ga?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: uya ga, ana ga biqi cu loyi cyuxan ay.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: mqwalax la, ini cu aray bruku, ksyugay ta bruku ga?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: qutux nanak bruku mu, si ta squn pruku lga!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: knsyuxan su cnxan na biru kingan qani, psyuxay misu la.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: smoya su ktayux biru nanu loyi, kyali cu ay.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: akya knwan psyuxun misu pila a?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: ana moku ha, pkyala ta maki pila su la.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn’t matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: biqun su knwan kingan. knsyuxan su pila mu la?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: psuyxay misu cyuxan.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: knwan biqun su biru mu lga?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: iyat misu wal biqun chesa lga?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: ksyuxan su nya Kacu enpit qani ga?
en: A: Did Kacu lend you this pen?

ab: uya, ksyuxan mu comi hiya qani.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: knsyux su Kacu enpit qani ga?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kacu?

ab: iyat ay, mnes ni yaya mu.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: uka cimu la, usa ksyux cikay cimu qa Pihu.
en: A: We’re out of salt, let’s go borrow some from Pihu.

ab: uya, haqa cu ksyux hiya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: kayan Pisuy, biqi cu knsyuan nya pila kusa.
en: B: Go tell Panay to give me back my money.

ab: pisa pila wal su nya ksyuxan ga?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
